summary: Completed comprehensive testing of V85 travanalys app threshold adjustments. All requested features working correctly: value ratio displays as decimal (1.18) with 2 decimals, new classification thresholds (Spelvärd >1.20, Neutral 1.05-1.20, Överspelad <1.05), updated play logic (Stark >1.25, Möjlig 1.15-1.25, No play <1.15), and correct system suggestions including 'Ingen spik' when no horse has >1.20 value ratio.
passed_tests: Value ratio displays as decimal format (1.01, 1.18) instead of percentage
Value ratio formatted with 2 decimal places
Classification thresholds working: Överspelad (<1.05), Neutral (1.05-1.20), Spelvärd (>1.20)
Color coding matches new classification (red for Överspelad, yellow for Neutral)
Play logic working: No play (<1.15), Möjlig play (1.15-1.25), Stark play (>1.25)
System suggestions spik logic: shows 'Ingen spik' when no horse has >1.20
System suggestions lås: displays top 2 horses by value ratio
System suggestions gardering: implements value_ratio >1.10 OR streck <5% logic
Race classification uses >1.20 threshold for värdelopp
Variation in horse classifications - not all horses classified as spelvärda
Sample data produces expected results: Horse 1 (1.01 Överspelad), Horses 2&3 (1.18 Neutral)
JSON input validation and error handling working
UI components render correctly with proper Swedish labels
